name: GrantGenie-AI
description: Agentic AI-powered startup grant recommendation and funding proposal generation system using IBM watsonx.ai
problem_statement: Startups often struggle to identify suitable funding opportunities, understand eligibility requirements, and prepare effective grant proposals.
solution: GrantGenie-AI uses multiple AI agents to analyze startup profiles, recommend suitable grants, verify eligibility, and generate AI-powered funding proposals.

agents.name: Startup Profile Agent
agents.purpose: Extracts startup domain, country, stage, technology, and funding requirements.

agents.name: Grant Recommendation Agent
agents.purpose: Analyzes startup information and recommends suitable grants.

agents.name: Eligibility Verification Agent
agents.purpose: Checks startup eligibility against grant requirements and provides eligibility scores.

agents.name: Proposal Generation Agent
agents.purpose: Generates structured funding proposals using AI.
